function.name: transcribe_cuneiform_tablet
function.description: Produce a sign-by-sign transcription of a cuneiform tablet from a high-resolution scan.

tablet_id.description: Museum accession number of the tablet

script_variant.description: Cuneiform variant, e.g. Old Babylonian, Neo-Assyrian

prompt: Please transcribe tablet BM-92668 — it's Neo-Assyrian.

function.name: catalog_philatelic_overprint
function.description: Register a postage stamp overprint variety in the philatelic catalog.

base_stamp_scott.description: Scott catalog number of the base stamp

prompt: Catalog the overprint on Scott #C13 — text is 'PROVISIONAL 1928' in red.

function.name: cue_opera_scene_change
function.description: Send a lighting and rigging cue for an opera scene transition.

prompt: Fire cue 'GO-LX-47' for Act 2 Scene 3.

function.name: date_antique_map_by_watermark
function.description: Estimate the production date of an antique map from its paper watermark.

prompt: Date this map. The watermark is a foolscap and the papermaker mark is 'J Whatman'.

function.name: analyze_manuscript_hand
function.description: Identify the script hand of a medieval manuscript folio.

prompt: Identify the hand on folio 47v of MS Bodley 264.

function.name: decode_etruscan_inscription
function.description: Decode an Etruscan inscription from a stone or bronze artifact.

find_site.description: Site where the artifact was found

prompt: Decode the Etruscan inscription 'mi larthia' found at Cerveteri.

function.name: log_ethnomusicology_recording
function.description: Log a field recording into the ethnomusicology archive.

prompt: Log a 312-second recording of Maria Tanase made in the village of Hateg.

function.name: schedule_marionette_workshop_build
function.description: Schedule construction of a new marionette in the workshop queue.

prompt: Schedule a new Pulcinella marionette in linden, with 9 strings.

function.name: mix_calligraphy_ink
function.description: Prepare a batch of traditional calligraphy ink.

prompt: Mix 250 ml of pine-soot ink with hide glue binder.

function.name: register_numismatic_die_pair
function.description: Register an obverse/reverse die pair for a coin issue.

prompt: Register die pair O-217 / R-83 from the Lugdunum mint.

function.name: translate_linear_b_tablet
function.description: Translate a Linear B Mycenaean tablet.

tablet_series.description: Tablet series code, e.g. PY Ta

prompt: Translate tablet PY Ta 711.

function.name: label_amphora_typology
function.description: Assign a Dressel typology label to an amphora find.

prompt: Classify the amphora with 14.5 cm rim and bifid handle.

function.name: record_oral_history_interview
function.description: Record metadata for an oral history interview.

prompt: Log interview: narrator Aino Kallas, interviewer Lehto, in Finnish.

function.name: scan_papyrus_fragment
function.description: Run multispectral imaging on a papyrus fragment.

prompt: Scan P.Oxy 4321 at 365,450,940 nm.

function.name: tune_gamelan_instrument
function.description: Set tuning for a single gamelan instrument.

prompt: Tune the saron demung to slendro.

function.name: annotate_illuminated_initial
function.description: Annotate a decorated initial letter in an illuminated manuscript.

prompt: Annotate the historiated initial 'B' on f.1r of MS Royal 2 B VII.

function.name: log_archaeological_stratum
function.description: Record a new stratigraphic context in an excavation log.

prompt: Log context 1042 at site VIN-23, soil is dark loam with charcoal.

function.name: request_pigment_xrf_analysis
function.description: Submit a paint pigment sample for XRF analysis.

sample_location.description: Where on the artwork the sample is taken

prompt: Request XRF on painting INV-441, sample from the angel's blue robe.

function.name: schedule_carillon_recital
function.description: Schedule a carillon recital on a tower bell instrument.

prompt: Schedule a recital at Mechelen St. Rumbold on 2026-07-12 by Eddy Mariën.

function.name: catalog_kabuki_costume
function.description: Catalog a kabuki theatre costume piece.

role_type.description: Kabuki role type, e.g. tachiyaku, onnagata

prompt: Catalog an onnagata costume in silk crepe.

function.name: register_runestone_find
function.description: Register a newly discovered runestone in the national registry.

prompt: Register a 168 cm Younger Futhark runestone at 59.2812,17.7843.

function.name: label_byzantine_icon
function.description: Add an iconographic label to a Byzantine icon.

prompt: Label this Hodegetria icon, attributed to the Cretan school.

function.name: prepare_vellum_sheet
function.description: Prepare a sheet of vellum for manuscript work.

animal_source.description: Animal source, e.g. calf, sheep, goat

finish.description: Surface finish, e.g. flesh side, hair side

prompt: Prepare a calf-vellum sheet with hair-side finish.

function.name: stage_noh_performance
function.description: Schedule and stage a Noh theatre performance.

prompt: Stage 'Hagoromo' in the Kanze school on 2026-09-15.

function.name: log_petroglyph_panel
function.description: Log a rock-art petroglyph panel in the field database.

prompt: Log panel TAN-09 with 23 motifs.

function.name: catalog_heraldic_blazon
function.description: Catalog a heraldic coat of arms by blazon.

prompt: Catalog the Visconti arms: 'Argent, a serpent azure crowned or vorant a child gules'.

gold_args.blazon: Argent, a serpent azure crowned or vorant a child gules

function.name: tag_dead_sea_scroll_fragment
function.description: Add metadata tags to a Dead Sea Scroll fragment.

prompt: Tag fragment 4Q41 with biblical book Deuteronomy.

function.name: schedule_kintsugi_repair
function.description: Schedule a kintsugi repair job for ceramic restoration.

metal.description: Metal used in the lacquer, e.g. gold, silver

prompt: Schedule kintsugi on a chawan with 4 fractures using gold.

function.name: annotate_folk_dance_step
function.description: Annotate a step in a folk dance notation file.

step_index.description: Index of the step in the sequence

prompt: Annotate step 7 of the Csárdás: a heel-click on the upbeat.

function.name: register_shadow_puppet
function.description: Register a new shadow puppet in the troupe inventory.

prompt: Register a Bima puppet in the wayang kulit tradition.

function.name: collate_codex_quires
function.description: Generate a collation diagram of the quires in a manuscript codex.

prompt: Collate MS Harley 4431 — 414 folios, quires of 8.

function.name: compute_dendro_date
function.description: Compute a dendrochronological date for a wood sample by cross-dating against a reference chronology.

prompt: Dendro-date sample BL-77, oak, 184 rings, against the South German oak master.

function.name: translate_ogham_inscription
function.description: Translate an Ogham inscription from an Irish standing stone.

prompt: Translate Macalister 145 into English.

function.name: match_potsherd_to_kiln
function.description: Match a potsherd to its production kiln site via fabric analysis.

prompt: Match sherd C-1907 (fabric group F4) to a kiln in southern Etruria.

function.name: reconstruct_pipe_organ_stop
function.description: Reconstruct a missing pipe organ stop based on historical specification.

stop_name.description: Name of the stop to reconstruct

prompt: Reconstruct Schnitger's missing 8' Vox Humana.

function.name: transcribe_neume_notation
function.description: Transcribe medieval neume notation into modern staff notation.

neume_family.description: Neume family, e.g. St. Gall, Beneventan

prompt: Transcribe 'Puer natus est' from St. Gall 359 — St. Gall neumes.

function.name: deduce_seal_matrix_origin
function.description: Deduce the workshop origin of a wax seal matrix from its iconography.

prompt: Trace this seal — eagle displayed, Latin legend, about 13th century.

function.name: transliterate_demotic_egyptian
function.description: Transliterate Demotic Egyptian script into Latin characters.

prompt: Transliterate lines 3-9 of ostracon O.Hor 2.

function.name: rehouse_archival_negative
function.description: Rehouse a photographic negative into a new archival enclosure.

support_type.description: Support type: glass plate, nitrate, acetate

prompt: Rehouse negative NEG-1923-04 — it's nitrate — into a polyester sleeve.

function.name: stage_commedia_lazzo
function.description: Stage a comedic lazzo routine within a commedia dell'arte performance.

prompt: Stage the lazzo of the fly with Arlecchino, about 75 seconds.

function.name: annotate_qajar_miniature
function.description: Annotate a Qajar-era Persian miniature painting with iconographic details.

prompt: Annotate miniature QM-0117: an audience scene under Fath-Ali Shah.

function.name: compile_dialect_isogloss
function.description: Compile an isogloss line for a dialect feature on a linguistic atlas.

feature.description: Linguistic feature, e.g. apocope of final -e

prompt: Draw an isogloss for the rounding of /a:/ in Stenträsk, Vilhelmina, Storuman.

function.name: submit_radiocarbon_sample
function.description: Submit an organic sample for AMS radiocarbon dating.

material.description: Sample material, e.g. bone collagen, charcoal

prompt: Submit 4.2 mg of bone collagen sample SK-19 to OxA for dating.

function.name: model_textile_warp
function.description: Set up a warp pattern on a historical-reconstruction loom.

prompt: Set up a warp-weighted loom with 14 threads/cm in linen.

function.name: log_florilegium_entry
function.description: Add an entry to a Renaissance florilegium plant compendium.

prompt: Log Tulipa gesneriana, illustrated by Daniel Rabel, plate 27.

function.name: decode_maya_glyph_block
function.description: Decode a Maya glyph block from a stela or codex.

prompt: Decode block C2 of Tikal Stela 31, Long Count 9.12.6.0.0.

function.name: convert_julian_to_gregorian
function.description: Convert a Julian calendar date used in early modern documents to a proleptic Gregorian date.

prompt: Convert 1654-02-29 Julian, recorded in the 5th year of Alexei Mikhailovich.

function.name: schedule_thangka_consecration
function.description: Schedule a Tibetan thangka consecration ceremony.

prompt: Schedule a Green Tara thangka consecration at Sera Je on the 15th day of the 4th lunar month.

function.name: register_phonograph_cylinder
function.description: Register a wax phonograph cylinder in the sound archive.

prompt: Register cylinder WX-441 recorded in 1903, plays at 160 rpm.

function.name: compile_grimoire_concordance
function.description: Compile a textual concordance across early modern grimoire manuscripts.

prompt: Concord 'sigillum' across Sloane 3853, Wellcome 110, BNF Lat 7170.

function.name: label_ukiyo_e_print
function.description: Label an ukiyo-e woodblock print with artist, series, and state.

prompt: Label a 2nd state Hokusai 'Thirty-Six Views of Mount Fuji' print.

function.name: analyze_hagiographic_topos
function.description: Analyze recurring topoi in a hagiographic saint's vita.

topos.description: Topos to track, e.g. infant prodigy, fasting

prompt: Track the fasting topos in the Vita Antonii, Coptic recension.

function.name: register_lithograph_state
function.description: Register a new state of a 19th-century lithograph.

prompt: Register state 3 of Daumier's 'Rue Transnonain' published by Aubert.

function.name: trace_provenance_chain
function.description: Trace the provenance chain of an artwork through historical ownership.

prompt: Trace provenance of INV-2008-77 from 1933 to 1947.

function.name: schedule_bayreuth_rehearsal
function.description: Schedule a rehearsal slot at the Bayreuth Festspielhaus.

prompt: Schedule Parsifal Act 2 rehearsal under Thielemann on 2026-06-21.

function.name: model_great_house_kiva
function.description: Model the layout of a Chacoan great-house kiva.

prompt: Model a kiva at Pueblo Bonito, 14.6 m across, 8 pilasters.

function.name: annotate_courtly_love_motif
function.description: Annotate a courtly love motif in a troubadour lyric.

prompt: Annotate the alba motif in Giraut de Bornelh's 'Reis glorios'.

function.name: catalog_glagolitic_charter
function.description: Catalog a medieval Glagolitic charter document.

prompt: Catalog a 1248 Glagolitic charter from Bishop Filip issued at Senj.

function.name: set_oud_maqam
function.description: Set the maqam mode for an oud performance.

prompt: Set maqam Bayati on D.

function.name: log_excavation_small_find
function.description: Log a small find such as a bead or fibula at an excavation.

prompt: Log a bronze fibula in context 312 at site HAL-04.

function.name: register_perfume_recipe_codex
function.description: Register a perfume recipe from a historical pharmacopoeia codex.

prompt: Register a rose-based recipe from f.34v of the Mappae Clavicula.

function.name: score_ballet_variation
function.description: Score a ballet variation into Stepanov notation.

prompt: Score Aurora's variation from Sleeping Beauty at 132 bpm.

function.name: match_obsidian_to_quarry
function.description: Match an obsidian artifact to a quarry source using trace element ratios.

prompt: Match obsidian blade OB-447 (Zr/Rb = 3.21) — candidates Melos, Giali, Pantelleria.

function.name: draft_palaeobotanical_report
function.description: Draft a palaeobotanical macroremains report for an excavation feature.

prompt: Draft palaeobotanical report for hearth F-117: emmer, barley, lentil; 8.5 L floated.

function.name: compile_iconclass_index
function.description: Compile an Iconclass index entry for a Northern Renaissance painting.

prompt: Index INV-991 under Iconclass 73D14 — Christ blessing the children.

function.name: reconstruct_proto_indo_european_root
function.description: Reconstruct a Proto-Indo-European root from attested cognates across daughter languages.

prompt: Reconstruct a PIE root from Sanskrit pitar, Greek patēr, Latin pater, Old Irish athir, gloss 'father', under standard three-laryngeal theory.

gold_args.cognate_set: Sanskrit pitar, Greek patēr, Latin pater, Old Irish athir

function.name: calibrate_bayesian_chronology
function.description: Calibrate a Bayesian chronology model over a stratigraphic sequence with multiple radiocarbon priors.

prompt: Calibrate chronology for site DUR-12 with priors {"PhaseA":["3200-3000BC"],"PhaseB":["3000-2800BC"]} on IntCal20, 200000 iterations.

function.name: reconstruct_lost_paleographic_ligature
function.description: Reconstruct a damaged paleographic ligature using statistical modeling over a Carolingian minuscule corpus.

lacuna_position.description: Position of the lacuna within the line

prompt: Reconstruct the damaged ligature on f.42r line 11 char 18 of MS Vat lat 3868 using a 60-char window.

function.name: model_textual_stemma
function.description: Build a Lachmannian stemma codicum across witnesses of a classical text using a probabilistic phylogenetic method.

method.description: Phylogenetic method, e.g. neighbor-joining, maximum parsimony

outgroup.description: Outgroup sigla used to root the tree

prompt: Build a stemma for Lucretius De Rerum Natura with witnesses O, Q, G, V, U, L using maximum parsimony, rooted on L.

gold_args.witness_sigla: O, Q, G, V, U, L

function.name: decipher_indus_script_seal
function.description: Attempt a computational decipherment of an Indus Valley script seal using sign frequency priors and positional models.

prompt: Decipher seal M-1186 with sign sequence 'M67 M99 M03 M12' using the Mahadevan corpus.

function.name: simulate_polyphonic_canon_resolution
function.description: Simulate the realization of a Renaissance riddle canon by enumerating contrapuntal voice-entry candidates.

prompt: Simulate the resolution of a 4-voice Ockeghem riddle canon at the fifth above, final on D.

function.name: estimate_chartreuse_distillation_yield
function.description: Estimate distillation yield for a historical chartreuse-style liqueur reconstruction with 130 botanicals.

still_type.description: Still type, e.g. alembic, pot still

prompt: Estimate yield for the Grand Chartreuse 1764 recipe, 220 L mash in an alembic, target 55% ABV.

function.name: georeference_portolan_chart
function.description: Georeference an antique portolan chart by anchoring rhumb-line nodes to modern coordinates.

prompt: Georeference portolan PORT-1399 using anchors [["Genova",[44.40,8.94]],["Alexandria",[31.20,29.92]]] in EPSG:3857 with RMS under 2500 m.

function.name: assign_skaldic_meter
function.description: Assign and validate the metrical pattern of an Old Norse skaldic stanza, including hendings and alliteration constraints.

stanza_text.description: Stanza text in normalized Old Norse

prompt: Assign dróttkvætt to Egill Skallagrímsson's stanza 'Þél høggr stórt fyr stáli'.

function.name: reconstruct_aksum_stele_inscription
function.description: Reconstruct a damaged Ge'ez royal stele inscription from Aksum using parallel formulae.

prompt: Reconstruct stele DAE-11 with surviving text 'ezana negus aksum' attributed to Ezana, using parallels RIE-185 and RIE-188.

function.name: model_iconographic_diffusion
function.description: Model the spatial diffusion of an iconographic motif across a corpus of dated artifacts using a Bayesian diffusion prior.

prompt: Model diffusion of the Daniel-in-the-lions'-den motif across corpus EARLYCHRIST-01 with Gaussian random walk prior, 3-6CE.

function.name: synthesize_lost_byzantine_chant
function.description: Synthesize a lost Byzantine chant melody from theta-notation skeletons and surviving cognate hymns.

prompt: Synthesize 'Ho monogenes' in echos plagal of second, using cognates Sinai Gr 1471 and Lavra Γ 67, theta signature 'θθ-α-ν'.

function.name: decompose_palimpsest_layers
function.description: Decompose a palimpsest into upper-text and under-text layers using multispectral imaging and PCA.

prompt: Decompose the Archimedes Palimpsest f.81 — 6 PCA components, wavelengths 365,450,505,535,625,940.

function.name: model_caravanserai_water_budget
function.description: Compute the seasonal water budget of a Silk Road caravanserai using cistern volume, evaporation, and caravan flow.

prompt: Compute July water budget for Robat-i Sharaf, 1180 m³ cistern, 22 caravans/month.

function.name: infer_inca_quipu_decimal_structure
function.description: Infer the hierarchical decimal accounting structure of an Inca khipu by analyzing knot positions across pendant and subsidiary cords.

prompt: Infer decimal structure of khipu UR-113 with 64 pendants, 3 subsidiary levels, colors crimson, ochre, white.
